name: loan-amount-30pct-discrepant-suppression
rationale: Broker correction asserts loan_amount $290,000; loan_application doc shows $115,000 (>50% discrepancy from broker). F1.LA Layer 1 (R11-B-1) detects >30% discrepancy and SUPPRESSES the loan_app source tuple from canonical_map for that field; broker source becomes sole authority. F2.DH discrepancyHold ACTIVATES due to major discrepancy. Tests both Layer 1 suppression mechanic and F2.DH gate co-activation.
notes: Two-event sequence. Distinct from A04 (multi-source conflict requiring resolution) — A08 specifically tests the suppression-at-threshold mechanic + concurrent gate activation.
